race.comment: CRUISE TO VICTORY (2) led throughout last start to score an effortless win over 1200m at this track. Jess Gray sticks with him and if he can run up to what he did last time out, he can get the job done again. PHAROAH SHOW (7) returns from a spell of ten weeks and is having his first run for a new yard. Finished 11th at Ascot over 1400m when first-up last time in work. One of the better hopes despite the layoff. COMMISSIONS (6) was well in the market first up from a spell last start over 1200m at Port Hedland but was safely held in fourth, beaten 6 lengths. Has the pace to be in a prominent position from the outset. One of the main contenders. LET'SDEAL (5) finished ninth over 2100m at Albany at his most recent appearance on April 5. Has switched to the Anthony Barton yard. Makes plenty of appeal. WHY ME (9) is worth including.
